alerts.title: Tram speed restriction near Surfers Paradise North
alerts.description: Southbound and northbound trams may run up to 4 minutes late between Cavill Avenue and Cypress Avenue.

alerts.title: Route 700 temporary stop relocation near Burleigh
alerts.description: Use temporary bay signage near Burleigh Heads Centre while streetscape upgrades are underway.

alerts.title: Broadbeach South weather operations
alerts.description: Short weather-related holding events are possible at Broadbeach South interchange tonight.

alerts.title: Cultural Centre platform works
alerts.description: Platform D has intermittent closures. Follow on-site instructions for routes 66, 111, and 444.

alerts.title: Northside event traffic
alerts.description: Minor evening delays expected for routes 330 and 333 around RBWH and Fortitude Valley.

alerts.title: Eight Mile Plains bay reassignment
alerts.description: Routes 111 and 169 are operating from alternate bays after 20:00.

alerts.title: Hyperdome interchange resurfacing
alerts.description: Occasional stand changes at Logan Hyperdome. Check bay signage before boarding.

alerts.title: Beenleigh station rail-bus interface notice
alerts.description: Connection waits may vary by up to 5 minutes while evening rail works run.
